found.quote: Notwithstanding Section 4, the Company will obtain Requisite Holder approval for any other matter that an investor reasonably identifies as material to its investment.
Notwithstanding Section 4, the Company will obtain Requisite Holder approval for any other matter that an investor reasonably identifies as material to its investment.
Each stockholder must provide any indemnity, escrow, holdback, non-compete covenant, or other seller obligation requested by the buyer as a condition to the drag-along.

the holder must first offer the shares to the Major Investors on the same terms stated in the transfer notice. Only if the Major Investors decline or fail to purchase all offered shares may the Company exercise a secondary purchase right.

No holder may transfer shares except in compliance with securities laws, this Agreement, and Company policies. These restrictions apply to all transfers unless the Board and the Requisite Holders approve the transfer in writing before it is effective.
excluding securities issued under equity incentive plans, as acquisition consideration, in strategic transactions, in equipment or lease financing, with debt financing, or in a public offering.

"Major Investor" means a holder of at least 100,000 shares of Series A Preferred Stock. "Requisite Holders" means any single Major Investor holding at least 10% of the outstanding Series A Preferred Stock.
